## BaseHeaderTogglePanel class

Toggle panel which uses the base toggle panel, adds a header and manage the open / close state of the panel.

<b>Signature:</b>

```typescript
export default class BaseHeaderTogglePanel extends Vue 
```
<b>Extends:</b> Vue

|  Property | Modifiers | Type | Description |
|  --- | --- | --- | --- |
|  [animation](./x-components.baseheadertogglepanel.animation.md) |  | Vue \| string | Animation component that will be used to animate the base-toggle-panel. |
|  [startCollapsed](./x-components.baseheadertogglepanel.startcollapsed.md) |  | boolean | Handles if the panel is open by default. |
